Title: Operación triunfo
Actors: Manu Guix, Àngel Llàcer, Noemí Galera
Plot: Famous Spanish show which combines a singing contest with reality TV. 16 participants are expected to defend their renditions of famous songs on a weekly basis; those considered to be the best of each week by a jury of experts get promoted, while the ones who have made a poorer performance need enough audience support to continue in the show or else get eliminated.
